context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements dimensional weight calculation using the specified DIM factors (139 for domestic/imperial, 5000 for metric), always charges the greater of actual vs dimensional weight with ceiling applied, and properly normalizes weight units.

checklist.name: DIM factor 139 used
checklist.description: Uses the value 139 as the DIM factor for imperial (cubic inches to pounds) calculations

checklist.name: DIM factor 5000 used
checklist.description: Uses the value 5000 as the DIM factor for metric (cubic cm to kg) calculations

checklist.name: Max of actual vs dim weight
checklist.description: Returns the greater of actual weight vs dimensional weight (uses Math.max or equivalent comparison)

checklist.name: Ceiling on dim weight
checklist.description: Applies Math.ceil (or equivalent ceiling function) to the dimensional weight before comparison

checklist.name: oz conversion correct
checklist.description: Converts ounces to pounds by dividing by 16

checklist.name: g conversion correct
checklist.description: Converts grams to pounds by dividing by 453.592 (or equivalent accurate conversion)

checklist.name: kg conversion correct
checklist.description: Converts kilograms to pounds by multiplying by 2.20462 (or equivalent accurate conversion)

checklist.name: Package interface defined
checklist.description: Package interface includes weight with value+unit (oz|lb|g|kg) and dimensions with length/width/height+unit (in|cm)

checklist.name: Imperial vs metric branching
checklist.description: Calculation branches on dimensions.unit ('in' vs 'cm') to select the appropriate DIM factor

checklist.name: Result in pounds
checklist.description: The final billable weight result is expressed in pounds (not kg or oz)
